videos.title: This Laptop gets up to 30 HOURS of Battery Life - Samsung Galaxy Book6 Pro
videos.description:
I travelled over 15,000KM to Australia with the new Samsung Galaxy Book6 Pro and the battery life was insane. It can get up to 30 hours which means I didn’t have to charge it over the 16 hour flight. With the Series 3 Intel Core Ultra Processors performance has been bumped up 1.6X CPU performance and 1.7X GPU Performance. I used Galaxy AI to help plan out my trip and used Multi Control to pair with my Galaxy S26 Ultra. A thin and powerful laptop, designed for creators.

#GalaxyBook6Pro #samsung
